products.title: Linked Sliding Partition System 100 - Soft Close (For Al. Frame 2+1 Doors)
features: Specially designed fittings for Al. frame sliding partition
Floor to ceiling installation with top sliding track
Soft close & soft opening function allows the door to close in slow motion without banging
High precise roller, stable, smooth & silent sliding.
